title: Inexorable Origins
description: Resolve the conflict between Apugli and Spectrum in a violent way
body:
There are some bugs between [apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli) and the enchantment "inexorable" (from [spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum))

It often causes the game to become unresponsive or even crash

This mod solves this problem in a relatively violent way

Cancel the check behavior and availability of the "inexorable" enchantment
